data.name: I got BLACKMAILED by a FUTANARI!
data.detailed_description:
Futa on Male, Futa on Female

Night shift puts all kinds of strain on a person, especially considering that it cuts into your me time...

One late night working you decide to rub one out to get it off your mind to get some work done. However, an unexpected visitor catches you in the act and decides to make good use of the damning information...

Realizing the repercussions, you give into her demands...

Read through an exciting story as well as some pretty raunchy(erotic) dialogue, accompanied by spicy nude depictions.

Gameplay
  • Choose your sexual organ (Penis or Vagina)
  • H-Scenes
  • ~4K words

Immerse yourself in the story by typing in your own name, then proceeding to read through a raunchy story from the first-person perspective.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 400 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
